response.global_analysis: Audio features a 3-song medley: '愛包ダンスホール', 'さよならプリンセス', and 'Mr. Showtime'. Vocal phonetics match the Reference JSON, confirming the songs are correct. The video contains medley-length segments, so I have discarded the unused portions of the reference lyrics. Timestamps are strictly tied to the audio vocalizations. Mid-sentence pauses (e.g., at 00:07.500 and 02:24.400) are handled by splitting the text into discrete blocks to maintain precise synchronization. On-screen text was used to verify the spelling of song titles and lyrics.

subtitles.original: 愛包ダンスホール
subtitles.english: Love-Wrapped Dance Hall

subtitles.original: 僕らが生まれて初めて知る音は
subtitles.english: The first sound we learn after we are born...

subtitles.original: 心臓の鼓動なの？
subtitles.english: Is it the beating of our hearts?

subtitles.original: タトント タトント タトント タテンタタトンダ
subtitles.english: Ta-ton-to, ta-ton-to, ta-ton-to...

subtitles.original: それはリズムと知った
subtitles.english: I learned that it was rhythm

subtitles.original: いにしえも 今どきも
subtitles.english: In ancient times and nowadays,

subtitles.original: ハイビートが僕らを作って繋いでんだろう
subtitles.english: High beats are what make us and connect us, right?

subtitles.original: アイ・パイ
subtitles.english: Ai-pai

subtitles.original: アイ・パイ・愛・パイで オレオレヨ
subtitles.english: Ai-pai, Ai-pai, ole, ole, yo!

subtitles.original: 蕩けっちゃおね 甘酸っぱいレモン 救愛人類パイ満載
subtitles.english: Let's melt, bittersweet lemon, love-seeking humanity full of pi

subtitles.original: 乾杯 完全にホレホレヨ
subtitles.english: Cheers! I'm completely in love, love, yo!

subtitles.original: 見ら見ら見たい愛踊り悪魔ねかパッパラパッパッパ
subtitles.english: Look, look, I want to see a love dance... pappara pappa pa!

subtitles.original: ラガラララララ
subtitles.english: La-ga-la-la-la-la...

subtitles.original: まるでラビリンスを踊ってるみたい
subtitles.english: it's like dancing through a labyrinth

subtitles.original: 生まれ変わったような気分でして
subtitles.english: Feeling like I've been reborn

subtitles.original: 乾杯ね 今日はボレロ
subtitles.english: Cheers! Today it's a bolero

subtitles.original: 妄信的バカなんて笑って
subtitles.english: Laughing at a blind fool

subtitles.original: テレレテテッテテッテ
subtitles.english: Te-re-re-te-te-te-te-te

subtitles.original: 愛おしいよな 終わりは近づけとさ
subtitles.english: It's lovely, let the end draw near

subtitles.original: 終わらないパイのように続きたい
subtitles.english: I want to continue like a never-ending pi

subtitles.original: 計算なんてできないが
subtitles.english: I can't even calculate it

subtitles.original: アイ・パイ アイ・パイダンスホール 今日はボレロ
subtitles.english: Ai-pai, Ai-pai Dance Hall, today it's a bolero

subtitles.original: 蕩けっちゃおね 甘酸っぱいレモン 救愛人類パイ満載
subtitles.english: Let's melt, bittersweet lemon, love-seeking humanity full of pi

subtitles.original: また食べに来てね
subtitles.english: Please come back to eat again

subtitles.original: あなたならいつでもいいよ
subtitles.english: For you, anytime is fine

subtitles.original: おかわり欲しいでしょ
subtitles.english: You want a refill, don't you?

subtitles.original: 愛包ダンスホール
subtitles.english: Love-Wrapped Dance Hall

subtitles.original: おかわりならもし
subtitles.english: If you want a refill

subtitles.original: 愛包ダンスホール
subtitles.english: Love-Wrapped Dance Hall

subtitles.original: どうぞ
subtitles.english: Here you go

subtitles.original: さよならプリンセス 宙に舞っている
subtitles.english: Goodbye princess, fluttering in the air

subtitles.original: 眠り沈むその姿は華やかな
subtitles.english: Sleeping, sinking, your figure is glamorous

subtitles.original: 魅惑のハッピーエンド 私とさよならだ
subtitles.english: An enchanting happy ending, it's goodbye to me

subtitles.original: 鏡の中独り縛られて
subtitles.english: Tied up alone in the mirror

subtitles.original: 頭の中逃げ回る毎日です
subtitles.english: My head is running around every day

subtitles.original: ずっと ずっと だって私変われないし
subtitles.english: Always, always, 'cause I can't change

subtitles.original: 夢もないし 口もないし つまらないし
subtitles.english: And I have no dreams, no mouth, boring

subtitles.original: 可愛くもないし 分からないし 仕方ないし
subtitles.english: Not even cute, I don't know, I can't help it

subtitles.original: 不意に気づいたらまるで
subtitles.english: Suddenly I noticed

subtitles.original: 指輪が首輪になっていたんだ
subtitles.english: The ring had become a collar

subtitles.original: 壊れた大人の愛情なんだ
subtitles.english: It's the distorted affection of an adult

subtitles.original: 期待をかけて
subtitles.english: Pinning your hopes on me...

subtitles.original: 私のことなんて気にしないでね
subtitles.english: just don't mind me

subtitles.original: さよならプリンセス 宙に舞っている
subtitles.english: Goodbye princess, fluttering in the air

subtitles.original: 独り浮かぶその姿は華やかな
subtitles.english: Floating alone, your figure is glamorous

subtitles.original: 魅惑のハッピーエンド 私とさよならだ
subtitles.english: An enchanting happy ending, it's goodbye to me

subtitles.original: 間抜けなプリンセス 過去とバイバイだ
subtitles.english: Stupid princess, say bye-bye to the past

subtitles.original: この際ね何もかもを燃やしてしまおう
subtitles.english: At this point, let's burn everything down

subtitles.original: このまま宙を泳いであの星になれたら
subtitles.english: If only I could swim through the air and become that star

subtitles.original: 私 私とさよならだ
subtitles.english: Goodbye to me, to myself

subtitles.original: 心を洗え 妬み渦巻いた
subtitles.english: Wash your heart, jealousy swirls...

subtitles.original: 体の中から空回り毎日です
subtitles.english: My body is spinning in vain every day

subtitles.original: ずっと ずっと だってあなた頭いいし
subtitles.english: Always, always, 'cause you are smart

subtitles.original: 変わらないし 足長いし 面白いし
subtitles.english: And you don't change, you have long legs, you're funny

subtitles.original: 顔も可愛いし さりげないし 仕方ないし
subtitles.english: Your face is cute, you're nonchalant, I can't help it

subtitles.original: 溢れるオーラはまるで
subtitles.english: Your overflowing aura is like...

subtitles.original: キラキラ輝く安定剤ね
subtitles.english: a sparkling stabilizer

subtitles.original: めろめろ私も面目ないね
subtitles.english: I'm head over heels, I'm so ashamed

subtitles.original: 古い息の私のことなんて
subtitles.english: The old version of me...

subtitles.original: 探さないでね
subtitles.english: don't come looking for her

subtitles.original: さよならプリンセス 愛に酔っている
subtitles.english: Goodbye princess, drunk on love

subtitles.original: 独り浮かぶその姿は鮮やかな
subtitles.english: Floating alone, your figure is vivid

subtitles.original: 理想のハッピーエンド 私とさよならだ
subtitles.english: An ideal happy ending, it's goodbye to me

subtitles.original: さよならプリンセス 全てバイバイだ
subtitles.english: Goodbye princess, say bye-bye to everything

subtitles.original: 巡り巡る幸せに絡まるほど
subtitles.english: As much as I get entangled in the revolving happiness

subtitles.original: 間抜けなハッピーエンド 可愛くなれたかな
subtitles.english: A stupid happy ending, did I become cute?

subtitles.original: 私 私はすでに分かっていたんだ
subtitles.english: I, I already knew it

subtitles.original: これでさよならか
subtitles.english: Is this goodbye?

subtitles.original: ちょっと どうもこうも 煮え切らない とっちらかっちゃって まとまらない
subtitles.english: You know what? I just can't make up my mind. It's so messed up...

subtitles.original: ひとりぼっちの世界に響く モノローグ
subtitles.english: The monologue echoes in this lonely world.

subtitles.original: あれもこれも できやしない？ 回る回るメリーゴーランド
subtitles.english: Is it impossible for me to do this and that? The merry-go-round goes round.

subtitles.original: ぐだって うだって いくほど 持て余すハングリー
subtitles.english: The more I mess around and waste time, the more I become hungry.

subtitles.original: あっちこっち 進んで止まって 独りよがり
subtitles.english: Moving back and forth, getting stuck, all by myself.

subtitles.original: どん詰まりでも諦めない 駆けろスターダム
subtitles.english: Even in a dead end, I won't give up, run towards stardom!

subtitles.original: ならひとりぼっちじゃつまらないでしょ
subtitles.english: Then, being all alone must be boring, right?

subtitles.original: 有象無象も全て あの星を目指せ
subtitles.english: Everyone, every one of you, aim for that star!

subtitles.original: まるで掴みやしない 届きやしない 願いもしまって
subtitles.english: Even the wishes that can't be grasped, keep them safe.
